response.justification: Sarah has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, or advanced AI education — key requirements for this director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial track record with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Deep full-stack fluency across languages and systems including DLang, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling
Active knowledge sharing through workshops and open-source contributions demonstrating leadership
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product development or deployment at scale
Lacks advanced degree in AI or related field; education is BS in Computer Science only
Limited evidence of cloud architecture strategy or direct engagement with enterprise AI customers
